title: astragalus corniculatus
intro: Astragalus corniculatus, also known as hoary milkvetch, is a perennial plant native to North America, belonging to the legume family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its adaptogenic and anti-inflammatory properties, which help to boost the immune system and reduce stress. The medicinal properties of Astragalus corniculatus are attributed to its high content of flavonoids, alkaloids, and saponins, which have been shown to exhibit antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and immunomodulatory effects, leading to various health benefits such as improved cardiovascular health, reduced fatigue, and enhanced lung function. Astragalus corniculatus can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
